summary: The diff shows minimal changes: backend/main.mo was emptied to a bare actor, Footer.tsx received minor updates (caffeine.ai attribution and copyright), and project_state.json was updated. None of the three requirements (REQ-16, REQ-17, REQ-18) appear to have been implemented based on the available evidence.

missing_requirements.reason: No changes to static asset configuration, frontend/public directory, or asset loading logic. No verification or fixes for PreviewSection or HeroSection image loading are present.

missing_requirements.reason: While main.mo now contains minimal valid Motoko syntax (empty actor), there is no evidence of diagnosing or fixing previous compilation errors, or ensuring proper actor structure beyond the bare minimum.

hallucinated_features.reason: Footer modifications were not requested in the BuildRequest. The requirement was to maintain existing features and fix deployment errors, not add new attribution links.
